examples.name: Basic output with two modules and redundancy on C9606R
examples.input:
Chassis Type: C9606R

Mod Ports Card Type                                   Model          Serial No.
---+-----+--------------------------------------+--------------+--------------
1   48   48-Port 10GE / 25GE                         C9600-LC-48YL    CAT2431L0MD
3   0    Supervisor 1 Module                         C9600-SUP-1      FDO24261BQN

Mod MAC addresses                    Hw   Fw           Sw                 Status
---+--------------------------------+----+------------+------------------+--------
1   E41F.7B6D.F280 to E41F.7B6D.F2FF 1.1  17.8.1r       S2C                power-deny
3   9077.EE4D.9700 to 9077.EE4D.977F 1.1  17.8.1r       S2C                ok

Mod Redundancy Role     Operating Redundancy Mode Configured Redundancy Mode
---+-------------------+-------------------------+---------------------------
3   Active              non-redundant             sso

Chassis MAC address range: 64 addresses from 3c57.31bc.2b80 to 3c57.31bc.2bbf

examples.name: Output with blank module slots and no chassis MAC range
examples.input:
Chassis Type: C9606R

Mod Ports Card Type                                   Model          Serial No.
---+-----+--------------------------------------+--------------+--------------
1   24   24-Port 40GE / 100GE                        C9600-LC-24C     CAT2252L0PV
2   0    Blank Module                                C9600-SLOT-BLANK N/A
3   0    Blank Module                                C9600-SLOT-BLANK N/A
4   0    Supervisor 2 Module                         C9600X-SUP-2     FDO271904CG
5   0    Blank Module                                C9600-SLOT-BLANK N/A
6   48   48-Port 10GE / 25GE / 50GE                  C9600-LC-48YL    CAT2312L2G4

Mod MAC addresses                    Hw   Fw           Sw                 Status
---+--------------------------------+----+------------+------------------+--------
1   70B3.175A.8580 to 70B3.175A.85FF 1.0  17.10.1r      BLD_POLARIS_DEV_LA ok
4   5856.9FB2.A080 to 5856.9FB2.A0FF 2.1  17.10.1r      BLD_POLARIS_DEV_LA ok
6   DC8C.37A0.4480 to DC8C.37A0.44FF 1.0  17.10.1r      BLD_POLARIS_DEV_LA ok

Mod Redundancy Role     Operating Redundancy Mode Configured Redundancy Mode
---+-------------------+-------------------------+---------------------------
4   Active              non-redundant             sso

examples.name: Single switch with many modules and redundancy status on C9500X
examples.input:
Chassis Type: C9500X-28C8D

Mod Ports Card Type                                   Model          Serial No.
---+-----+--------------------------------------+--------------+--------------
1   38   Cisco Catalyst 9500X-28C8D Switch           C9500X-28C8D     FDO25030SLN

Mod MAC addresses                    Hw   Fw           Sw                 Status
---+--------------------------------+----+------------+------------------+--------
1   F87A.4125.1400 to F87A.4125.147D 0.2  17.7.1r[FC3]  2021-09-30_14.02_a ok

Mod Redundancy Role     Operating Redundancy Mode Configured Redundancy Mode
---+-------------------+-------------------------+---------------------------
1   Active              non-redundant             Non-redundant

Chassis MAC address range: 512 addresses from f87a.4125.1400 to f87a.4125.15ff
